questions.question: Who was the Roman centurion who sent for Peter?
What did Peter see in his vision on the rooftop?
options: A great sheet with animals lowered from heaven
questions.answer: A great sheet with animals lowered from heaven

questions.question: Peter initially refused to eat the animals in his vision because they were unclean.
God has shown me that I should not call any _____ unholy or unclean.
While Peter was still speaking, the Holy Spirit fell on all those who heard the _____.
